summary: A game/app with user authentication (Google sign-in), a leaderboard, and an anime character selection system featuring characters from Naruto, One Piece, Bleach, and Dragon Ball. Each character has their own autonomous movement (not player-controlled).
architectural_notes: Characters move autonomously — no direct player control over character movement
known_issues: Previous build attempt for leaderboard + anime character features failed and is being retried
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Anime-style stylized bust portrait of a spiky blonde ninja boy with whisker marks on his cheeks and orange outfit (naruto-uzumaki-avatar.dim_128x128.png)
- Anime-style stylized bust portrait of a dark-haired ninja boy with a blue outfit and red fan symbol, cold expression (sasuke-uchiha-avatar.dim_128x128.png)
- Anime-style stylized bust portrait of a cheerful boy with a straw hat, black hair, and a red vest, wide grin with a scar under one eye (luffy-avatar.dim_128x128.png)
- Anime-style stylized bust portrait of a green-haired swordsman with three swords and a bandana, serious expression (zoro-avatar.dim_128x128.png)
- Anime-style stylized bust portrait of a spiky orange-haired teen with intense brown eyes and a black outfit (ichigo-avatar.dim_128x128.png)
- Anime-style stylized bust portrait of a short black-haired girl with large violet eyes and a black kimono-style outfit (rukia-avatar.dim_128x128.png)
- Anime-style stylized bust portrait of a spiky black-haired martial artist with a confident smile, orange gi top (goku-avatar.dim_128x128.png)
- Anime-style stylized bust portrait of a flame-shaped widow's-peak dark-haired warrior with a scowl and blue battle armor (vegeta-avatar.dim_128x128.png)

existing_features.title: Add a leaderboard screen that displays the top users ranked by points, showing each user's display name, selected anime character avatar, and total points score. The leaderboard should be accessible from the bottom navigation bar with a trophy or leaderboard icon tab.

Add an anime character selection screen that allows users to choose their character from a roster of well-known characters spanning Naruto (e.g., Naruto Uzumaki, Sasuke Uchiha), One Piece (e.g., Luffy, Zoro), Bleach (e.g., Ichigo, Rukia), and Dragon Ball (e.g., Goku, Vegeta). The selected character should be saved to the user's profile and displayed on the leaderboard and throughout the app.

Each anime character should have its own autonomous animated movement on screen — characters walk, run, or perform signature moves independently without any player input. When a character is active (selected by the user or displayed on a shared screen), it should animate continuously using CSS or canvas-based animations that reflect the character's style (e.g., Naruto's running pose, Goku's power-up stance).

Generate illustrated anime-style character avatars for each selectable character: Naruto Uzumaki, Sasuke Uchiha, Monkey D. Luffy, Roronoa Zoro, Ichigo Kurosaki, Rukia Kuchiki, Son Goku, and Vegeta. Each avatar should be a simple stylized bust/portrait suitable for character selection cards and leaderboard entries.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add a leaderboard to the app
Add anime character selection screen with characters from Naruto, One Piece, Bleach, and Dragon Ball
Each selectable anime character should have their own autonomous movement (not player-controlled)
